title: trichosanthes cucumerina subsp. anguina
intro: Trichosanthes cucumerina subsp. anguina is a plant species commonly known as the snake gourd or serpent gourd, belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Trichosanthes cucumerina subsp. anguina can be made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
